hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/judge-hook.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/judge-hook.sh"
PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/writing-guard.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/writing-guard.sh"
PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/research-nudge.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/research-nudge.sh"
